title: db.rs: Row struct duplicated 3x in payment_sessions queries
description:
Location: wallet/src/db.rs — all_sessions(), get_session_by_address(), sessions_to_watch() each define an identical local Row struct with 10 fields and identical row→PaymentSession mapping logic (duplicated ~20 lines 3x).

Why it matters: If payment_sessions schema changes (new column, type change), all three Row structs and all three mapping closures must be updated in lockstep. Missing one will silently compile but produce incorrect data.

Fix: Extract a module-level SessionRow struct and a session_from_row(r: SessionRow) -> Result<PaymentSession> helper. The three query methods become 5-line functions that differ only in the SQL WHERE clause.
close_reason: SessionRow + session_from_row() extracted; all three query methods refactored; 175 wallet tests pass
